subcodes.first_line: O Varqa! What thou didst send unto the servant in attendance before the Throne hath indeed arrived and hath attained unto the hearing of the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقاء قد حضر ما ارسلته الی العبد الحاضر لدی العرش و فاز باصغاء المظلوم فی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
